sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n61205" key="kwqa/rion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κωθάριον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <gramGrp opt="n" TEIform="gramGrp"> <gram type="dim" opt="n" TEIform="gram">Dim. of</gram> </gramGrp> sq., cj. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0405.tlg001:27:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anaxandr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">27.3</biblScope> </bibl> (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κωβῐδαρίων</foreign> codd.).</entryFree>
